creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Seeing the following error building openjdk-jdk11u-jdk-11.0.6-10-1 on CURRENT (13, amd53, r359028, GENERIC-NODEBUG 

* For target hotspot_variant-server_libjvm_objs_sharedRuntime.o:
/var/tmp/tmpfs0/usr/home/koobs/repos/freebsd/ports/java/openjdk11/work/openjdk-jdk11u-jdk-11.0.6-10-1/src/hotspot/share/runtime/sharedRuntime.cpp:2809:85: error: expression does not compute the number of elements in this array; element type is 'double', not 'relocInfo' [-Werror,-Wsizeof-array-div]
      buffer.insts()->initialize_shared_locs((relocInfo*)locs_buf, sizeof(locs_buf) / sizeof(relocInfo));
                                                                          ~~~~~~~~  ^
